title: Pre-phase-2 principal audit checkpoint
problem: Phase 1 MVP golden gate is complete (ticket-032). Before Phase 2 work (live Ollama paths, expanded intelligence, or new public surfaces), a principal audit must confirm safety boundaries, env/config posture, and queue priorities.
acceptance_criteria: Read-only audit report in agent_reports/ covering safety model, public export boundary, env/secrets posture, and Phase 2 risk priorities.
Explicit go/no-go for first Phase 2 implementation ticket.
No runtime or schema changes in the audit ticket itself.
non_goals: Do not implement Phase 2 features in the audit ticket.
Do not enable live Ollama in golden tests.
